title: Department Manager Vacancy at Poojara Telecom - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Poojara Telecom - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Poojara Telecom in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Poojara Telecom:
Poojara Telecom is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poojara Telecom!
